caption: A person with dark hair wearing a red shirt is seen in a small video window on the right side of a screen recording. The main area of the screen displays a web browser open to a Statista page featuring a bar chart titled "Percentage of COVID-19 cases in the United States from February 12 to March 16, 2020 resulting in death, by age group*". To the right of the person's video feed is a vertical scrolling chat window with various usernames and messages. A prominent red banner spans the bottom of the screen; in the first three frames, it reads "Youtube.com/user/Destiny", but in the final frame, it changes to "Youtube.com/c/NormalAmericawithRobNoerr". Across the sequence, the person in the video remains in a similar pose while the chat text updates, and the browser page remains static.
